AI Insights
"Based on historical POS data and local demand, this location is expected to achieve profitability within 18 months. Revenue is projected to grow steadily with peak performance during weekends and holidays."
AI Recommendations
Increase seating capacity by 15%
Promote weekday lunch campaigns
Optimize menu pricing
Increase average order value
Hire two additional staff during peak hours

Methodology

Historical POS Features

  • Customer Turning Rate
  • Selling Price per Plate
  • Number of Plates Sold

Break-even Analysis

The break-even point is calculated where the Total Revenue curve intersects the Total Cost curve.

Revenue Formula

TR = Price × Quantity Sold

(Revenue is calculated based on average selling price and number of plates sold.)

Cost Formula

TC = Fixed Cost + Variable Cost × Quantity Sold

(Total cost includes fixed expenses and variable cost per plate sold.)

Forecast Features Used

  • Revenue Range
  • Break-even Point
  • Required Revenue
  • Daily Revenue Target
  • Average Order Value
  • Daily Average Spending
  • Expected Occupancy
  • Peak Occupancy
  • Customer Turning Rate
  • Historical POS Sales
